summary: Tested Sessions Dashboard sync with Map Live Logic. All UI features verified working: Session Setup card, Potential Earnings Calculator ($500 total), Promotional Preview panel with 'Surfer Preview', Live Savings badge. Backend earnings-breakdown API and pricing APIs working. 2 endpoints failing due to database schema migration issue.

critical.issue: 500 Internal Server Error - Database schema missing 'live_session_id' column in live_session_participants table
critical.root_cause: sqlalchemy.exc.ProgrammingError: column live_session_participants.live_session_id does not exist

critical.issue: 500 Internal Server Error - Same database schema issue with live_session_id column

integration_issues.issue: 403 Forbidden errors when logged-in user accesses pricing endpoints (likely permission issue for non-photographer users viewing photographer dashboard)

action_items: RUN DATABASE MIGRATION: Add 'live_session_id' column to live_session_participants table to fix active-session and session-history endpoints
Optional: Review permissions for pricing endpoints - currently returning 403 for non-photographer users
critical_code_review_comments: models.py has 'live_session_id' column defined on LiveSessionParticipant but database schema is out of sync
Database migration needed: ALTER TABLE live_session_participants ADD COLUMN live_session_id VARCHAR(36)

sessions_dashboard_ui.session_setup_card: WORKING - Shows Session Buy-in ($25), Photos Included (3), Additional Photo Price ($5 with Save $5 badge), Max Surfers (10)
sessions_dashboard_ui.potential_earnings_calculator: WORKING - Shows Buy-ins ($250) + Photo sales ($250) = Total $500
sessions_dashboard_ui.promotional_preview_panel: WORKING - Shows 'Surfer Preview' with Live Session Savings, pricing breakdown, 50% OFF badge
sessions_dashboard_ui.live_savings_badge: WORKING - Shows 'Save $5 per photo!' comparing live ($5) vs gallery ($10) price
sessions_dashboard_ui.go_live_button: WORKING - Opens modal (blocked by location permission request)

backend_apis.earnings_breakdown: WORKING - Returns 4 revenue streams (live_sessions, request_pro, regular_bookings, gallery_sales) with total
backend_apis.gallery_pricing: WORKING - Returns photo tiers (web $3, standard $5, high $10) and video tiers
backend_apis.active_session: FAILING - 500 error due to missing live_session_id column
backend_apis.session_history: FAILING - 500 error due to missing live_session_id column

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sessions Dashboard UI is fully functional with all new components (LiveSavingsBadge, PotentialEarningsCalculator, PromotionalPreview). Backend has database schema issue - live_session_id column missing from live_session_participants table. Main agent needs to run Alembic migration to add the column. Earnings breakdown endpoint verified working with 4 revenue streams.
